G.S.R. 707(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Jharkhand hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Police Service (Pay) Second Amendment Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, in schedule II,– in Part A relating to posts carrying pay above the senior scale of pay of the Indian Police Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Jharkhand” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:– “JHARKHAND DGP, Jharkhand & HoPF Rs.80000/-(fixed) DGP, Home Guards & Fire Services HAG+75500 (annual increment @ 3%) 80,000/ Additional Director General of Police – HQ HAG 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police – Training & Modernisation HAG 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police – CID HAG 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police – Special Branch HAG 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police – Law & Order HAG 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police – JAP HAG 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Inspector General of Police – Operations-cum-STF and ATS PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Training PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – SAF (JAP) PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Organized Crime PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – CID PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Special Branch PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Railway Police PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Ranchi Zone PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Dumka Zone PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Bokaro Zone PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Human Rights PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Police Modernization & Prov. PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Vigilance PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police – Palamu PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Ranchi Range PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Hazaribagh Range PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Palamu Range PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Dumka Range PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Koyala Kshetra Bokaro Range PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Headquarters & Personnel PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Budget PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- -- 11 of 13 -- 12 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Deputy Inspector General of Police – CID PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – PTC PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Special Branch PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Kolhan Range PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – HG & FS PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – STF PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/- Deputy Inspector General of Police – Comn. & Tech Services PB4+ GP Rs.8,900/-” (b) in Part B relating to posts carrying pay in the senior scale of the Indian Police Service under the State Governments including posts carrying special allowance in addition to pay, for the entries occurring under ‘Jharkhand’ the following shall be substituted in the table,– “SSP –Ranchi SSP –Singhbhum SP – Bokaro SP – Dhanbad SP – Garhwa SP – Gumla SP – Koderma SP – Pakur SP – Sahebganj SP – West Singhbhum SP – Chatra SP – Dumka SP – Girdih SP – Hazaribagh SP – Palamu SP – Deoghar SP – Godda SP – Lohardagga SP – Latehar SP – Saraikela SP – Simdega SP – Jamtera SP – City Ranchi SP – Rural Ranchi SP – CID SP – Special Branch SP – Tech.
